identity.mission: Design a high-frequency, professional crypto trading terminal that prioritizes data density and clarity over decoration.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Bloomberg Terminal' density with 'Linear' polish.
Data First: Every pixel must serve information. No fluff.
Contrast is King: Use neon accents only for critical signals (Profit/Loss/Alerts).
The 'Technical' Aesthetic: Visible grid lines, monospaced numbers, sharp edges.

rules: Use 'Manrope' for all UI labels, navigation, and headings.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numbers, prices, hashes, and tabular data.
Overlines / Labels must be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

strategies: Grid Borders: Use 'border-r border-b border-white/5' to separate panels.
No Card Backgrounds: Avoid heavy card backgrounds. Use the grid itself to define structure.
Density: Use 'h-full' on children to ensure they stretch to match their neighbors.
Sticky Headers: Use 'backdrop-blur-xl' with 'border-b border-white/5' for navigation.

inputs.base: h-9 rounded-sm border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.base: rounded-lg border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

tables.header: border-b h-10 px-2 text-left align-middle font-medium text-muted-foreground

login.layout: Split screen. Left: 3D abstract/Texture. Right: Form.
login.visuals: Use abstract cyberpunk background on left.

sections.name: Stats
sections.grid_area: col-span-12 md:col-span-12 lg:col-span-12 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4
sections.content: KPI Cards (Balance, PnL, Win Rate, Open Orders)

history.layout: Full width table with filters on top.

visual_enhancers.scanlines: background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 2px)
visual_enhancers.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons. Use 'lucide-react' icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
